benefits.name: Uber Cash
benefits.merchant_notes: Up to $15/mo ($35 in Dec). Must add card to Uber account. Credits appear as Uber Cash.

benefits.name: Resy Restaurant Credit
benefits.merchant_notes: Up to $100/quarter at Resy restaurants when booking through Resy and paying with Platinum.

benefits.name: Saks Fifth Avenue Credit
benefits.merchant_notes: Up to $50 semi-annually at Saks Fifth Avenue. Jan-Jun and Jul-Dec periods. Enroll via Amex Offers.
benefits.activation_notes: Enroll through Amex Offers before making purchase.

benefits.name: Airline Fee Credit
benefits.merchant_notes: Up to $200/year for incidental fees (baggage, seat upgrades, etc.) on one selected airline. Must select airline in dashboard.
benefits.activation_notes: Select a qualifying airline in your Amex online account each calendar year.

benefits.name: Hotel Collection Credit
benefits.merchant_notes: Up to $200 statement credit on prepaid bookings of 2+ nights through The Hotel Collection or Fine Hotels + Resorts.

benefits.name: Digital Entertainment Credit
benefits.merchant_notes: Up to $20/mo for eligible streaming subscriptions: Disney+, Hulu, ESPN+, The New York Times, Audible, Peacock, SiriusXM.
benefits.activation_notes: Enroll each subscription through Amex Offers.

benefits.name: Walmart+ Membership Credit
benefits.merchant_notes: Statement credit covers Walmart+ monthly membership ($12.95/mo or $98/yr equivalent). Enroll through Amex.
benefits.activation_notes: Enroll through Amex Benefits or Walmart+ signup flow.

benefits.name: Equinox Credit
benefits.merchant_notes: Up to $25/mo toward an Equinox gym membership or Equinox+ digital subscription.

benefits.name: CLEAR Plus Credit
benefits.merchant_notes: Statement credit covering CLEAR Plus membership ($189/yr). Pay with Platinum card.

benefits.name: Global Entry / TSA PreCheck Credit
benefits.merchant_notes: Up to $100 every 4 years for Global Entry ($120) or TSA PreCheck ($78). Modeled as annual but resets every 4+ years.

benefits.name: FHR / THC Prepaid Hotel Credit
benefits.merchant_notes: $200 Fine Hotels + Resorts or The Hotel Collection prepaid credit on 2+ night stays booked via Amex Travel.

benefits.name: Uber Cash
benefits.merchant_notes: Up to $10/mo in Uber Cash. Must add Gold card to Uber account. Use for rides or Uber Eats.

benefits.name: Resy Restaurant Credit
benefits.merchant_notes: $100/year dining credit at Resy restaurants when booking through Resy and paying with Gold Card.

benefits.name: Dunkin' Credit
benefits.merchant_notes: Up to $7/mo statement credit at Dunkin' Donuts locations.

benefits.name: Dell Technologies Credit
benefits.merchant_notes: Up to $100 semi-annually at Dell Technologies. Jan-Jun and Jul-Dec periods. Enroll through Amex Offers.
benefits.activation_notes: Enroll through Amex Offers before purchasing from Dell.

benefits.name: Indeed Credit
benefits.merchant_notes: Up to $360/year ($30/mo equivalent) for Indeed job posting credits.

benefits.name: Adobe Credit
benefits.merchant_notes: Up to $150/year statement credit for Adobe products and subscriptions (Creative Cloud, etc.).

benefits.name: Wireless Telephone Credit
benefits.merchant_notes: Up to $10/mo for wireless telephone purchases made directly from US service providers.

benefits.name: CLEAR Plus Credit
benefits.merchant_notes: Statement credit covering CLEAR Plus membership ($189/yr). Pay with Business Platinum.

benefits.name: Travel Credit

benefits.merchant_notes: Complimentary Lyft Pink All Access membership (valued ~$50/yr). Provides ride discounts and perks.

benefits.name: Peloton Credit

benefits.name: Hotel Credit
